name: Pumpkin Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, salt and cinnamon; set aside.
2. Cream together the shortening and sugar in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy using an electric mixer at medium speed. Beat in the egg.
3. Combine the pumpkin and milk in a small bowl. Add the dry ingredients alternately with the pumpkin mixture to the creamed mixture, stirring well after each addition.
4. Spoon the batter into paper-lined 2-1/2-inch muffin pan cups, filling them 2/3 full.
5. Bake in a 350 degree F. oven for 20 minutes or until golden brown. Serve hot with butter and homemade jam.
